text: The revolving credit facility of EUR 50,000,000 (Account No. DE89370400440532013000) shall accrue interest at EURIBOR plus 150 basis points per annum.
The borrower maintains a collection account (IBAN: GB29NWBK60161331926819) at Barclays Bank plc into which all receivables are deposited daily.
The syndicated term loan facility of USD 300 million has a tenor of 5 years, with quarterly principal repayments commencing 12 months after the drawdown date.

extractions.text: syndicated term loan facility of USD 300 million

text: The escrow account (Account ref: ESC-2024-0042) holds EUR 5,000,000 as security deposit until project completion, with funds released upon satisfaction of the conditions precedent.
Under the mortgage facility agreement, the outstanding balance of GBP 1,250,000 is secured against the freehold property located at 42 Crown Street, London.
